items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• I buy I sell
• I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle
• I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e
• I want to buy a car I want to sell my house
• I want to buy a new car I need to sell my car

items.prompt: Eu quero comprar uma casa nova Eu preciso vender minha loja
items.answer: I want to buy a new house I need to sell my stor e

items.prompt: Eu quero comprar um carro Eu quero vender minha casa
items.answer: I want to buy a car I want to sell my house

items.prompt: Eu quero comprar um carro novo Eu preciso vender meu carro.
items.answer: I want to buy a new car I need to sell my car

items.prompt: Eu quero comprar um vestido Eu quero vender meus CDs
items.answer: I want to buy a dress I want to sell my CDs

items.text: 1. What do you need to buy today?
I want to buy a house I want to sell my bicycle
